summary: Phase 2 Deferred Slice 4 (local custom character management) passes all verification criteria. The script verify-phase2-deferred4.ps1 runs successfully. The deterministic custom character manager module at src/shared/customCharacterManager.ts is complete with types, validation, serialization, and defensive copies. The customCharacterManager tests cover adding validated custom characters, listing built-ins plus customs, selecting by stable id, removing custom characters, protecting built-ins, serialization/deserialization, and invalid input. The acceptance report exists. No forbidden features were implemented.

src/shared/customCharacterManager.ts exists with createCustomCharacterManager, serializeCustomCharacters, and deserializeCustomCharacters.
src/shared/customCharacterManager.test.ts has 7 test cases covering all required behaviors.
npm run build succeeds for renderer, main, and preload outputs.
Forbidden files are absent: startupLaunch.ts, hotkeys.ts, pluginActions.ts, backend.ts, notifications.ts.
src/App.tsx has no file upload or import/export UI patterns.

next_maker_instruction: No further maker iteration is needed for Phase 2 Deferred Slice 4. Await human approval before starting the next deferred slice or Phase 3.
